head.title: Careers | Moonstone Advocates
head.description: Take your legal career further at Moonstone. Discover trainee, solicitor and business support opportunities in a supportive team where you can grow, thrive and make a real difference.
head.ogDescription: Take your legal career further at Moonstone. Discover trainee, solicitor and business support opportunities in a supportive team where you can grow, thrive and make a real difference.

blocks.html:
Careers at Moonstone

Take your career further at Moonstone

We believe our people are our greatest strength. Whether you’re a future trainee an experienced solicitor, or wanting to make a difference in support you’ll find a workplace that empowers you to grow, be yourself, and make a real difference.

View current vacancies

Home
Careers

Current vacancies

Whether you’re beginning your career or taking the next step, we’ll back you with expert guidance, meaningful work, and a team that genuinely cares.

We don’t have any live vacancies at the moment, but we’re always interested in hearing from talented people. If that's you, please contact us.

Please check back soon for future opportunities.

Apprenticeships

Our Apprenticeship Schemes offer a direct route to qualification as a lawyer, without the cost of university, and with support from a team known for exceptional client care

Find out more

Training Contracts

We’re focused on organic growth, which is why we look to recruit talented Trainee Solicitors and support them all the way through to qualification and beyond.

Find out more

Work Experience

We run week-long placements throughout the year for students keen to gain real experience in a commercial law firm trusted by high net-worth and business clients for exceptional service and client care.

Find out more

Our values

Our culture is key. We know it’s special. As we continue to grow, we want to keep hold of that. Our values shape how we work, how we treat each other, and how we show up every day. They guide our decisions. They set the standard. They make sure that as we grow, we grow in the right way.

This is what we expect of ourselves and of each other.

Be Positive. Be Approachable. Be Supportive. Be Present. Be Yourself.
‍

Diversity and equal opportunities

Our people are our greatest strength. We’re proud to build a team that reflects different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences. We’re committed to equal opportunities for everyone. That means creating a working environment where you can thrive, develop, and reach your full potential.

Free from discrimination. Free from harassment. Supported to be yourself.

Our vision

To be an inspirational organisation: The trusted adviser of choice for commercial and high net-worth clients, renowned for exceptional service, and client care.

Why work with us

Time, security, and support.

We believe time away from work matters. That’s why annual leave starts at 24 days, plus Bank Holidays, and increases with length of service. You’ll also get your birthday off, and an extra day at Christmas so you can properly switch off and spend time where it counts. If you want a little more flexibility, our holiday purchase scheme lets you buy additional leave.

We support your future too. We offer a competitive pension contribution, enhanced maternity, adoption and paternity schemes, and help with travel to work depending on your role. It’s about giving you security, flexibility, and the right support at every stage of life.

Looking after your health.

Our medical support is practical, accessible, and there when you need it. We offer a Medicash healthcare cash plan to help with everyday health costs, along with free flu jabs and bi annual heart health checks to keep you on track.

It’s all part of making sure you feel supported, both in and out of work.

A community that cares.

Life at Moonstone means something. We look after our people and create a place where everyone feels supported and connected. From paid counselling and menopause support to financial wellbeing sessions and holistic therapies, we invest in your overall wellbeing.

We come together too. Whether it’s our January wellbeing month, our Christmas party or our annual quiz and awards night, we make time to celebrate and strengthen the connections that matter.

A voice from within Moonstone...
Moonstone is an outstanding place to work. Colleagues at every level are approachable and generous with their time, creating a supportive environment. The firm’s positive atmosphere provides daily motivation and inspiration.
Lee Fawcett
Legal Accounts Manager

More than a workplace

Work matters. But so do the moments in between.

This Is Us - An opportunity for our teams to share what they do, helping everyone at Moonstone better understand and connect with the people behind each practice area.

‍Annual Pie & Pea Day - A Yorkshire staple that brings the whole firm together.

Kampala Pride - We’re proud to sponsor and take part in Kampala Pride, championing a culture where individuality is valued and everyone feels they belong.

This Is Me - A lunch time session where our people share their journeys, challenges, achievements and what truly matters to them, because everyone's story deserves to be heard.

Charity Bake Sales - Throughout the year, our teams roll up their sleeves (and icing bags) to raise money for our Charity of the Year.

Dragon Boat Race - A firm favourite that brings out our teamwork, resilience and a healthy dose of competitive fun.

Regulatory responsibilities

As part of our regulatory responsibilities, the Solicitors Regulation Authority asks us to share diversity data about our team.

Our latest submission

We're committed to a better future

Our Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) responsibilities are embedded into the way we operate; from reducing our environmental footprint to supporting our people, clients, and communities. We're proud to foster a culture that champions sustainability, inclusivity and integrity. It's not just what we do, it's who we are.

View our statement
